data.title: California's War On Illegal Cannabis: $120M Seized, 37 Tons Of Marijuana Destroyed So Far In 2024
data.description: California's task force seizes over $120 million in illegal cannabis since January 2024, targeting unlicensed operations.

data.title: Palantir Co-Founder Joe Lonsdale Concurs On AI Not Driving Immediate Growth: 'We've Failed So Far Because It's Not Impacting The Entire Economy Right Away'
data.description: Joe Lonsdale, co-founder of Palantir Technologies, discussed on CNBC the significant impact of AI on the U.S. services industry and the future challenges for big tech, particularly highlighting Palantir's success amid market volatility and skepticism about AI's immediate benefits for Apple.

data.title: Planet 13 Reports 20.3% Revenue Growth In Q2 2024, Expands Florida Operations
data.description: Planet 13's Q2 2024 revenue rose by 20.3% to $31.1 million, driven by Florida operations and strong SuperStore sales.

data.title: Top Wall Street Forecasters Revamp Evergy Price Expectations Ahead Of Q2 Earnings
TerrAscend's Q2 2024 Results: Keeps 48.6% Of Revenue As Profit, EBITDA Margin Increases
data.description: TerrAscend Corp. (OTC: TSNDF) reported net revenue of $77.5 million for the second quarter of 2024, reflecting a 7.5% increase compared to $72.1 million in the same period in 2023.
